overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi video game showing a character in a spacesuit exploring a dimly lit space station interior with red emergency lighting. The character walks along panoramic windows overlooking space, passes a seated NPC, and explores the industrial metallic environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: space station observation deck with panoramic windows

agents.ego_description: standing near the panoramic window looking out at space, occasionally shifting position and glancing around the room

entered.detail: large curved window showing stars and space outside with metallic frame
X-shaped structural steel beams supporting the ceiling
red glowing emergency lights mounted on the ceiling
metal storage crate with blue markings on the floor
metal bench along the window wall

segments.scene_description: The character stands in a dimly lit space station observation deck, bathed in red emergency lighting. Large panoramic windows reveal the darkness of space outside, while industrial metal beams and equipment crates populate the interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: space station corridor with seating area

events.description: character begins walking steadily along the window wall toward the right side of the room

agents.ego_description: walking along the window wall toward a seated figure on the right

notable_agents.action: seated on a bench facing away from the window, wearing dark clothing

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the observation deck, passing by industrial equipment crates. A seated NPC becomes visible on a bench to the right. The panoramic window remains visible on the left as the character moves through the red-lit corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: space station observation area near window

events.description: character stops walking and stands still near the window
character turns around to face back toward the interior and begins walking

agents.ego_description: standing still near the window looking out at space, then turning to face the interior

notable_agents.action: remains seated on the bench in the background

segments.scene_description: The character pauses at the right side of the observation deck, standing near the window. After a moment of observation, the character turns to face the interior. The seated NPC remains visible in the background on the bench.

events.description: character begins walking back toward the left side of the room

agents.ego_description: walking back along the window wall toward the original position, passing the seated NPC

notable_agents.action: seated on bench, watching as the character walks past

segments.scene_description: The character walks back through the space station interior, passing the seated NPC once more. The panoramic windows slide back into view on the right as the character returns toward the center of the observation deck, with red emergency lights continuing to illuminate the industrial metal surroundings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit space station observation deck that shifts from a static view of the void to a rhythmic exploration of the industrial interior. It begins with the character standing amidst metal beams and equipment crates, bathed in red emergency lighting while panoramic windows reveal the darkness of space. As the character walks forward, the camera tracks past industrial crates and a seated NPC on a bench, keeping the vast window in view to the left. The scene then pauses as the character lingers by the glass before turning back toward the station's interior. Finally, the camera follows the character as they pass the NPC once more, with the panoramic windows sliding back into view on the right while the red glow continues to illuminate the metallic surroundings.
